allow: PowerShell(Get-ChildItem "C:\\Projet\\site phi 2" -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($?\) { Write-Output "---"; \(Get-Item "C:\\Projet\\site phi 2"\).FullName })

PowerShell($bytes = [System.IO.File]::ReadAllBytes\("C:\\Projet\\site phi 2\\lib\\validation.ts"\); $start = 0; for \($i = 0; $i -lt $bytes.Length; $i++\) { if \($bytes[$i] -eq 0x4E -and $bytes[$i+1] -eq 0x4F -and $bytes[$i+2] -eq 0x5F\) { $start = $i; break } }; $bytes[$start..\($start+60\)] | ForEach-Object { "{0:X2}" -f $_ } | Select-Object -First 60)

PowerShell($bytes = [System.IO.File]::ReadAllBytes\("C:\\Projet\\site phi 2\\lib\\validation.ts"\); $bad = 0; foreach \($b in $bytes\) { if \($b -lt 0x20 -and $b -ne 0x09 -and $b -ne 0x0A -and $b -ne 0x0D\) { $bad++ } }; "Control bytes \(excluding tab/CR/LF\): $bad")

PowerShell(Get-ChildItem "C:\\Projet\\site phi 2" -Recurse -File -Force | Where-Object { $_.FullName -notmatch "node_modules|\\.next|\\.claude" } | Sort-Object FullName | ForEach-Object { $_.FullName.Replace\("C:\\Projet\\site phi 2\\", ""\) })
